title: OpenTracing API Compatibility
description: Using the OpenTracing standard API to start, propagate, and finish traces via DDTrace adapters. Two adapter namespaces exist: OpenTracer (legacy, permissive types) and OpenTracer1 (1.x, strict PHP types).

use_cases.name: Start a Span
use_cases.description: Call startSpan(operationName, options) on OT Tracer adapter. Options unwrapped from StartSpanOptions (tags, start_time, finish_span_on_close, ignore_active_span). Span is wrapped in OT-compatible Span object. Internal span flagged with SPAN_FLAG_OPENTRACING.

use_cases.name: Start an Active Span
use_cases.description: Call startActiveSpan(operationName, options). Creates a Scope wrapping a DDTrace Scope. Marks active span with SPAN_FLAG_OPENTRACING. Returns OT-compatible Scope.

use_cases.name: Activate an Existing Span
use_cases.description: Call ScopeManager.activate(OTSpan, finishSpanOnClose). Adapter unwraps OT Span (or converts via Span::toDDSpan) to DDSpan, then delegates to DDTrace ScopeManager.activate(). Returns OT-compatible Scope wrapper.

use_cases.name: Get Active Scope
use_cases.description: Call ScopeManager.getActive(). Delegates to DDTrace ScopeManager which reconciles internal/userland scopes (reconcileInternalAndUserland). Returns OT Scope wrapper or null.

use_cases.name: Inject Span Context for Propagation
use_cases.description: Call Tracer.inject(OTSpanContext, format, &carrier). SpanContext is unwrapped (or converted via toDDSpanContext). DDTracer.inject() serializes context into carrier using headers: x-datadog-trace-id, x-datadog-parent-id, x-datadog-sampling-priority, x-datadog-origin, ot-baggage-* prefix.

use_cases.name: Extract Span Context from Carrier
use_cases.description: Call Tracer.extract(format, carrier). Delegates to DDTracer.extract() which uses Propagator to read headers. Result wrapped in OT SpanContext adapter.

use_cases.name: Get Scope Manager
use_cases.description: Call Tracer.getScopeManager(). Lazily constructs and caches an OT ScopeManager adapter wrapping the DDTrace ScopeManager.

use_cases.name: Get Active Span
use_cases.description: Call Tracer.getActiveSpan(). Delegates to DDTracer.getActiveSpan(). Result wrapped in OT Span adapter or returns null.

use_cases.name: Flush Completed Traces
use_cases.description: Call Tracer.flush(). Delegates directly to DDTracer.flush() to send buffered spans.

use_cases.name: Close All Root Scopes
use_cases.description: Call ScopeManager.close() (via DDTrace\Contracts\ScopeManager). Closes all hostRootScopes, finishing root spans. Typically one per request.

use_cases.name: Initialize OpenTracing Adapter
use_cases.description: Construct Tracer via new Tracer($ddTracer) or static make(transport, propagators, config). Falls back to GlobalTracer::get() if no tracer provided.

key_relationships: OpenTracer1\Tracer implements OpenTracing\Tracer (OTTracer) with strict PHP types
DDTrace\Propagator interface defines inject/extract with DD headers
Tracer adapters delegate ALL operations to DDTrace core tracer
Span/SpanContext adapters use unwrapped() to pass DD objects to core
Span::toDDSpan() and SpanContext::toDDSpanContext() convert plain OT objects to DD objects
opentracer_vs_opentracer1_differences: OpenTracer1 uses strict PHP return types (:OTScope, :?OTScope, :void, :?OTSpan, etc.)
OpenTracer legacy has permissive/no return types for backward compatibility
OpenTracer1 always passes ignore_active_span; OpenTracer checks method_exists first (compatibility)
important_notes: Both adapters implement the standard OpenTracing PHP API (opentracing/opentracing). The adapter pattern (wrapper/unwrapper) is consistent throughout: every OT object wraps a DDTrace object and exposes unwrapped() for core delegation. SPAN_FLAG_OPENTRACING is set on every span created via OT API for internal tracking. DDTrace\ScopeManager.reconcileInternalAndUserland() bridges internal C-extension spans with userland PHP scope stack.
